items.line: Tightening the Beehiiv-first publishing loop, native LinkedIn funnel, and classroom edition workflow.
Hardening the synced Brain into a reliable research, librarian, and briefing layer for daily work.
Building the public home for Dustin's practical AI work, with the Brain stats feed becoming part of the live site story.
Converging the work board and agent status view into one pane for todos, routing, and visibility.
